name: Button / Primary
description: Primary CTA - used for Add to cart and Buy ticket actions

name: Button / Secondary
description: Secondary action - used for Reserve, Read more

name: Button / Ghost
description: Minimal outlined button for low-emphasis actions

name: Nav / Desktop
description: Horizontal nav header: Hem · Böcker · Evenemang · Om oss · Kontakt

name: Nav / Mobile Hamburger
description: Hamburger menu for mobile viewports below 768px

name: Card / Book
description: Staff pick or pre-order card: cover image, title, author, price in SEK

name: Card / Event
description: Event listing card: poster thumbnail, date, title, ticket button

name: Hero / Homepage Banner
description: Full-width hero: bookshop exterior photo by Maja Lindqvist, tagline overlay

name: Footer
description: Site footer: address, opening hours, newsletter signup, social icons

name: Badge / Language
description: Pill badge: EN / SV / DE / FR for shelf-language labelling on book cards

name: Section Divider
description: Full-width horizontal rule with 80px vertical padding

name: Quote / Pullout
description: Large typographic pullout quote - used on about page and event descriptions

name: Newsletter / Signup Form
description: Email input + subscribe button + GDPR consent checkbox, embedded Mailchimp

name: Poster / A3 Template
description: Print-ready A3 event poster template: dark linen texture, serif headline, date pill

name: Window Display / Frame
description: Shop window frame draft for seasonal display planning with shelf layer

name: Badge / Staff Pick
description: Handwritten-style 'Personalens val' badge overlay for book cover images

name: Price Tag
description: Inline price display in SEK: e.g. 229 kr, with optional struck-through original price

name: Author Bio Block
description: Author portrait + short bio text block used on event detail pages

name: Ticket CTA
description: Buy ticket block with Stripe checkout link, seat count remaining, and price

name: Search Input
description: Algolia-powered search input for book titles, authors, and translators

name: 404 Page
description: Custom 404 with Weaver & Book branding, Swedish copy, and back-to-shop link
